---
title: "Internet Appendix for: Your Paper Title"
author:
  - name: Your Name
    email: you@example.org
    affiliations:
      - name: Your Department, Your University
        address: Some Address, Country
        corresponding: true
  - name: Co-Author One
    email: one@example.org
    affiliations:
      - name: Co-Author Department, Co-Author University
        address: Some Address, Country
date: today
date-format: "[This revision:] D MMMM YYYY"
abstract: |
  This Internet Appendix provides supplementary results, robustness
  checks, additional tables and figures, and proofs that complement
  the main paper. Replace this paragraph with a one- or two-sentence
  description of what readers will find here.
bibliography: references-appendix.bib

format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    documentclass: article
    classoption:
      - "12pt"
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    linestretch: 2
    indent: true
    fontsize: 12pt
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: red
    citecolor: blue
    urlcolor: magenta
    cite-method: natbib
    biblio-style: apalike
    keep-tex: true
    subparagraph: true
    # Restart appendix section numbering with letters (A, B, C, ...)
    # and prefix headings with "Appendix" so readers can tell at a
    # glance that they are in the supplementary material.
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{amsthm}
        \usepackage{subcaption}
        \usepackage{setspace}
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \usepackage{multirow}
        \usepackage{longtable}
        \usepackage{tabularx}
        \usepackage{float}
        \usepackage{sectsty}

        \AtBeginEnvironment{tabular}{\onehalfspacing}
        \subsectionfont{\large\itshape}
        \subsubsectionfont{\large\itshape}

        \makeatletter
        \def\@seccntformat#1{\@ifundefined{#1@cntformat}%
            {\csname the#1\endcsname\quad}%
            {\csname #1@cntformat\endcsname}%
        }
        \def\section@cntformat{\thesection.\quad}
        \def\subsection@cntformat{\thesubsection \quad}
        \makeatother

        \tolerance=1
        \emergencystretch=\maxdimen
        \hyphenpenalty=10000
        \hbadness=10000

        \renewcommand{\thesection}{Appendix \Alph{section}}
        \renewcommand{\thesubsection}{\Alph{section}.\arabic{subsection}}
        \renewcommand{\thetable}{\Alph{section}.\arabic{table}}
        \renewcommand{\thefigure}{\Alph{section}.\arabic{figure}}
        \renewcommand{\theequation}{\Alph{section}.\arabic{equation}}

        \theoremstyle{plain}
        \newtheorem{theorem}{Theorem}[section]
        \newtheorem{proposition}[theorem]{Proposition}
        \newtheorem{lemma}[theorem]{Lemma}
        \theoremstyle{definition}
        \newtheorem{definition}[theorem]{Definition}
        \newtheorem{assumption}[theorem]{Assumption}
---

# Sample Construction and Matching {#sec-app-matching}

Describe additional details about the sample, propensity-score
matching, or other data construction not covered in the main paper.

# Auxiliary Methodology {#sec-app-method}

Walk through derivations or estimator details that were summarized
in the main text. A representative supplementary equation:

$$
\widehat{\beta}_{IA} = (X' X)^{-1} X' y
$$ {#eq-app-baseline}

@eq-app-baseline refers to the supplementary specification.

# Robustness Tables {#sec-app-robust}

Tables and figures that did not fit in the main paper.

# Proofs {#sec-app-proofs}

::: {.proof}
A proof of Proposition 1 from the main paper.
:::
